name: Social, Content & UX (NIP-51, 52, 53, 58, 72)
description: Lists, calendars, live activities, badges, communities

quiz.question: What does NIP-51 define?
quiz.explanation: NIP-51 standardizes various user-defined lists on Nostr.

quiz.question: Which NIP covers "Live Activities" like live streams and real-time events?
NIP-58 ("Badges") is used to:
options: Represent and award badge-style achievements or marks to users
quiz.explanation: NIP-58 defines how badges are represented and issued.

quiz.question: NIP-33 parameterized replaceable events are addressed by a coordinate of:
quiz.explanation: The address is kind:pubkey:d-value. The 'd' tag distinguishes multiple replaceable events of the same kind per user (e.g., different articles or lists).
